deploy.startCommand: if [ "$MODE" = "web" ]; then cd apps/web && bun run start --port ${PORT:-3000}; elif [ "$MODE" = "worker" ]; then bun run apps/worker/src/main.ts; elif [ "$MODE" = "api" ]; then bun run apps/api/src/main.ts; else bun run apps/worker/src/main.ts & bun run apps/api/src/main.ts; fi
